brief_title: Combination Chemotherapy Plus Radiation Therapy in Treating Patients With Metastatic Rhabdomyosarcoma or Sarcoma
official_title: A Phase II "Up-Front Window Study" of Irinotecan (CPT-11) Followed by Multimodal, Multiagent, Therapy for Selected Children and Adolescents With Newly Diagnosed Stage 4/Clinical Group IV Rhabdomyosarcoma: An IRS-V Study

pmids.citation: Soft Tissue Sarcoma Committee of the Children's Oncology Group; Lager JJ, Lyden ER, Anderson JR, Pappo AS, Meyer WH, Breitfeld PP.
